title: Propulsion Assignment
description: Model the propulsion of a rocket in space, analyzing its velocity and acceleration as its supply of fuel changes.

title: Combustion Analysis
description: Building off of assignment 1, analyze how the rate of the combustion changes with the pressure and temperature inside the combustion chamber.

title: Nozzle Design Project
description: Design three models for a nozzle. Analyze each nozzle's propulsion and exhaust velocity as a function of the rate of combustion.

title: Aerodynamics Quiz
description: Take the quiz on the fundamentals of aerodynamics. You have one attempt.

title: Flow Analysis
description: Create a visualization of the velocity of air around a wing traveling at different velocities. Take into account both speed and wing orientation.

title: Heating Analysis
description: Create a visualization of the heating caused by a spacecraft traveling through the atmosphere.

title: Structural Design Task
description: Explain each component of a spaceship and how it is integrated into the design. How can they withstand the forces they endure?

title: Orbital Calculations
description: You are each given a date for launch. Find the optimal path to reach Mars.

title: Systems Engineering Exam
description: Take the exam on systems engineering. You have one attempt. Godspeed.
